Layered Paper Art Workshop

Date: Friday, April 17, 2026
Time: 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM
Ages: 12+
Price: $15

About This Event

Inspired by the intricate layered papercut work of artist Marina Papercuts (@marinapapercuts), this hands-on evening workshop guides you through the craft of layered paper art — cutting, layering, and arranging sheets of paper to create a piece with real depth and dimension.

What You'll Create

  • A layered paper art piece built step-by-step
  • Multiple layers of cut paper that create a sense of depth and dimension
  • A finished piece that tells a story through imagery and color

Cost

$15 per person — all materials provided.

Details

  • Ages 12+
  • Space is limited — register early to save your spot.

Registration

Register below to reserve your spot at the Layered Paper Art Workshop!

This event has been cancelled.

We're sorry for the inconvenience. Check back for future events!
